ddls:
CREATE TABLE "yearly_data" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year's data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "eco_driving_properties" INTEGER /* Eco-driving properties (e.g., 0 for no eco-driving, 1 for eco-driving) */,
  "low_rolling_resistance_properties" INTEGER /* Low rolling resistance properties (e.g., 0 for no low rolling resistance, 1 for low rolling resistance) */,
  "eco_mpg_improvement" REAL /* Improvement in miles per gallon (MPG) due to eco-driving and low rolling resistance */,
  "eco_mpkwh_improvement" REAL /* Improvement in miles per kilowatt-hour (MPkWh) due to eco-driving and low rolling resistance */,
  "tire_mpg_improvement" REAL /* Improvement in miles per gallon (MPG) due to tire technology */,
  "tire_mpkwh_improvement" REAL /* Improvement in miles per kilowatt-hour (MPkWh) due to tire technology */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the year */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity for the year */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road (e.g., highway, urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, electric) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Size of the engine (e.g., 2.5L) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., front-wheel, all-wheel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tires" (
  "tire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tire */,
  "tire_make" TEXT /* Make of the tire */,
  "tire_model" TEXT /* Model of the tire */,
  "tire_size" TEXT /* Size of the tire (e.g., 215/65R17) */,
  "tire_type" TEXT /* Type of tire (e.g., all-season, summer) */,
  "rolling_resistance" TEXT /* Rolling resistance of the tire (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "tread_depth" REAL /* Depth of the tread (e.g., 10/32") */,
  "tire_pressure" REAL /* Recommended pressure for the tire (e.g., 35 PSI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_tire_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-tire mapping */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "tire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tire */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the tire was installed on the vehicle */,
  "mileage_at_installation" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle when the tire was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_tire_mapping_tire_id FOREIGN KEY ("tire_id") REFERENCES tires ("tire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_tire_mapping_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to (e.g., R&D, QA) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Engineering, Research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year's data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES yearly_data ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the permission applies to */,
  "column_names" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of column names the permission applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_permissions" (
  "team_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team permission */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the permission applies to */,
  "column_names" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of column names the permission applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance occurred */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tire_pressures" (
  "tire_pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tire pressure event */,
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle-tire mapping */,
  "pressure_date" TEXT /* Date when the tire pressure was recorded */,
  "front_left_pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the front left tire */,
  "front_right_pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the front right tire */,
  "rear_left_pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the rear left tire */,
  "rear_right_pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the rear right tire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tire_pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tire_pressures_mapping_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapping_id") REFERENCES vehicle_tire_mapping ("mapping_id")
)
